title: HOT WEATHER INFORMATION - 211info
text: CROOK COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HOT WEATHER INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about local hot weather events. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 447-5165 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 447-5165 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Crook County Services: Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment.
